svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="mcu-init" name="MCU Initialization Sequence"> <mxGraphModel dx="-480" dy="-139" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="MCU Initialization and Super-Loop" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="10" width="400" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" value="1. HAL Init
(clocks, GPIO)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="60" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" value="2. PWM = 0%
(safe state)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="60" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" value="3. Init Watchdog
(IWDG 2s)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="60" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" value="4. Load Config
(flash + CRC)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="60" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" value="5. Init USB
CDC-ECM" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="60" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" value="6. Init TCP
(lwIP)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="790" y="60" width="80" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" style="strokeColor=#666;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s1" target="s2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e23" style="strokeColor=#666;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s2" target="s3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e34" style="strokeColor=#666;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s3" target="s4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e45" style="strokeColor=#666;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s4" target="s5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e56" style="strokeColor=#666;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="s5" target="s6" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop_box" value="7. Super-Loop (infinite)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="150" width="830" height="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6loop" style="strokeColor=#666;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="s6" target="loop_box" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" value="Poll lwIP
(tcp_stack)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="200" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" value="Process received
messages" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="200" width="130" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" value="Check ADC
ready flag" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="410" y="200" width="120" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" value="Send telemetry
(sensor + health)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="570" y="200" width="130" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l5" value="Feed
Watchdog" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="740" y="200" width="100" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="el12" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="l1" target="l2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="el23" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="l2" target="l3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="el34" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="l3" target="l4" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="el45" style="strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="l4" target="l5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop_back" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" parent="1" source="l5" target="l1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="790" y="300" /> <mxPoint x="140" y="300" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dispatch" value="Message Dispatch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="340" width="760" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d1" value="ActuatorCommand
validate + apply PWM" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="375" width="140" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d2" value="ConfigUpdate
validate + store flash" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="375" width="140" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d3" value="DiagnosticRequest
get version/config" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="375" width="140" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d4" value="StateSyncRequest
send full state" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="580" y="375" width="140" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
